zh.Bruges, Belgique: 比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔
zh.Brugge, Flandre Occidentale, BELGIQUE, S: 比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Ghistelles III於1260年出生時，他的父親Jean II de Ghistelle15歲，母親Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede12歲。他於從1284年到1289年6月與Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1315年10月28日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔享年55歲，埋葬在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔。

zh-hans.Bruges, Belgique: 比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Ghistelles III于1260年出生时，他的父亲Jean II de Ghistelle15岁，母亲Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede12岁。他于从1284年到1289年6月与Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1315年10月28日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔享年55岁，埋葬在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Ghistelles III was born in 1260, his father, Jean II de Ghistelle, was 15 and his mother, Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede, was 12. He married Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg from 1284 to June 1289, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 28 October 1315, in Brugge, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 55, and was buried in Brugge, West Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Ghistelles III est né en 1260, son père, Jean II de Ghistelle, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg du 1284 au juin 1289, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1315, à Brugge, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Brugge, Flandre occidentale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Ghistelles III 1260 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean II de Ghistelle 15 und seine Mutter Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede 12. Er hat von 1284 bis Juni 1289 in Europa Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1315 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Brugge, West-Flandern, Belgien und wurde in Brugge, West-Flandern, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Ghistelles III è nato il nel 1260, il suo padre, Jean II de Ghistelle, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg da 1284 a giugno 1289, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 ottobre 1315, nel Brugge, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Brugge, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio.

ja.Brugge, Flandre Occidentale, BELGIQUE, S: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンブルグッジ
ja.Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーvラアンデレン
ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Ghistelles IIIが1260年に生まれた時，父Jean II de Ghistelleは15歳，母Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstedeは12歳であった。から1284年まで1289年6月にヨーロッパでMargaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1315年10月28日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンブルグッジで55歳で死去し，ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンブルグッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Ghistelles III(이)가 1260년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean II de Ghistelle(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1284년 부터 1289년 6월 까지 우럽에서 Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1315년 10월 28일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 브루지에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 브루지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Ghistelles III nasceu em 1260, seu pai, Jean II de Ghistelle, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg de 1284 a junho de 1289, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1315, em Brugge, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Brugge, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Ghistelles III родился в 1260 г., его отцу по имени Jean II de Ghistelle было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg с 1284 по июнь 1289 в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 октября 1315 г. в местности бруг, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности бруг, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия.

sm.from 1284 to June 1289: mai le 1284 e o'o I le Iuni 1289

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Ghistelles III nació en 1260, su papá, Jean II de Ghistelle, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Isabelle van de Woestijne van Maelstede, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Margaretha Gerard van Limburg Luxemburg desde 1284 hasta junio de 1289, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1315, en Brugge, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Brugge, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica.
